title: Resolve real per-recipient channel address (email/phone) in the fan-out
business_reason: FR-NOTIFY-FANOUT-0014 deferred the channel address — recipients carried a logical (entity) address only, so delivery had nothing to send to. Resolve the recipient's REAL address from the source of truth (school coordinator email/mobile) by channel, so the (future) delivery worker can actually send.

design.pure_helper: server/notifications/fanout.ts channelAddressFor(channel, {email, mobile}, logicalFallback): email -> contact.email; sms_*/whatsapp_* -> contact.mobile; in_app/push -> the logical entity address; falls back to the logical address when the needed field is missing. Unit-tested (assertions reference the inputs, not literals — P0.9).
design.enrichment: fanoutEvent loads schools.coordinator_email/coordinator_mobile for school_user recipients on email/sms channels and sets channel_address via channelAddressFor (staff_user stays a logical ops inbox for now).

param_14.question: What address does a fanned-out recipient get for delivery?
param_14.answer: The recipient's real address for the channel: a school recipient on the email channel gets the school's coordinator_email; on sms/whatsapp, the coordinator_mobile; on in_app/push, the logical entity address (no mailbox needed). If the needed contact field is missing, it falls back to the logical address (so channel_address is never null).
param_14.security_implications: addresses resolved server-side from the source of truth (no client input); contact details are not exposed to the public verify response; in-app routing stays entity-based.
param_14.downstream_dependencies: per-staff mailbox lookup for staff_user recipients (still a logical ops inbox); the delivery/dispatch worker consumes channel_address.
